arguments.command:
mkdir -p /tmp/coreclr_syms
cd /tmp/coreclr_syms

# Download and check build IDs for recent .NET 10 versions (tombstone is from Feb 2026)
# Try 10.0.3, 10.0.4, 10.0.5 first (likely candidates for Feb 2026)
for ver in 10.0.3 10.0.4 10.0.5; do
  echo "=== Checking $ver ==="
  curl -sS -L -o "pkg_${ver}.nupkg" \
    "https://api.nuget.org/v3-flatcontainer/microsoft.netcore.app.runtime.android-arm64/${ver}/microsoft.netcore.app.runtime.android-arm64.${ver}.nupkg" 2>&1
  
  # Extract just the libcoreclr.so
  unzip -oq "pkg_${ver}.nupkg" "runtimes/android-arm64/native/libcoreclr.so" -d "extract_${ver}" 2>&1
  
  if [ -f "extract_${ver}/runtimes/android-arm64/native/libcoreclr.so" ]; then
    buildid=$(readelf -n "extract_${ver}/runtimes/android-arm64/native/libcoreclr.so" 2>/dev/null | grep "Build ID" | awk '{print $NF}')
    echo "Build ID: $buildid"
    size=$(stat -c%s "extract_${ver}/runtimes/android-arm64/native/libcoreclr.so")
    echo "Size: $size"
  else
    echo "libcoreclr.so not found in package"
  fi
  
  # Cleanup the large nupkg to save space
  rm -f "pkg_${ver}.nupkg"
  echo ""
done
